name: sangfor-xdr
description: OctoBus package for Sangfor XDR OpenAPI: asset management, security incidents, linkage response, vulnerability management, SOAR, OAuth2 auth, and threat expert incidents.

sangfor_xdr.AssetService/ListAssets.name: list-assets
sangfor_xdr.AssetService/ListAssets.description: List XDR assets with pagination and filters.

sangfor_xdr.AssetService/GetAsset.name: get-asset
sangfor_xdr.AssetService/GetAsset.description: Get a single XDR asset by ID.

sangfor_xdr.ResponseService/BanIP.name: ban-ip
sangfor_xdr.ResponseService/BanIP.description: Ban an IP through XDR linkage response.

sangfor_xdr.ResponseService/IsolateHost.name: isolate-host
sangfor_xdr.ResponseService/IsolateHost.description: Isolate a host through XDR linkage.
